sentences.arabic: كَانَ النَّاسُ يَقِيسُونَ الزَّمَنَ بِالشَّمْسِ وَالْقَمَرِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi su mjerili vrijeme suncem i mjesecom.
sentences.translationEn: People used to measure time by the sun and the moon.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ النَّهَارُ يَبْدَأُ بِشُرُوقِ الشَّمْسِ وَيَنْتَهِي بِغُرُوبِهَا.
sentences.translation: Dan je počinjao izlaskom sunca i završavao zalaskom.
sentences.translationEn: The day started at sunrise and ended at sunset.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْقَمَرُ يُحَدِّدُ بِدَايَةَ الشَّهْرِ الْجَدِيدِ.
sentences.translation: Mjesec je određivao početak novog mjeseca.
sentences.translationEn: The moon determined the beginning of the new month.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْفُصُولُ الأَرْبَعَةُ تُنَظِّمُ حَيَاةَ النَّاسِ.
sentences.translation: Četiri godišnja doba uređivala su život ljudi.
sentences.translationEn: The four seasons organised people's lives.
